tldr: Move audio/video sessions from Agora to Dyte by recreating meetings via Dyte's REST API and swapping in Dyte's client SDKs.
why_switch: Pre-built UI kit reduces client-side work
Recording and live streaming included in core product
Modern SDKs for web, mobile, and React
what_to_export: Custom UI components built on Agora primitives
export_method: Session state is ephemeral. Export your room inventory and any recordings from Agora's cloud storage to your own bucket before cancelling. Document custom UI components and signaling so they can be rebuilt on Dyte's primitives.
import_method: Create a Dyte organization, generate API keys, and use the REST API to create meetings and add participants. Install Dyte's web/mobile SDK or use the prebuilt UI kit. Issue auth tokens server-side per participant. Migrate behind a feature flag and validate quality before full cutover.

concept_mapping.note: Dyte meetings created via REST API
Choose between prebuilt UI or core SDK
Rebuild custom signaling on Dyte primitives

gotchas: Enterprise tier availability differs; confirm SLAs if you need them
Dyte's prebuilt UI may not match your existing design system
Platform coverage may not include every Agora SDK target
Recording storage and retention model is different
Custom signaling on RTM needs to be redesigned

email.subject: Cancelling Agora account
email.body:
Hi Agora team,

We're migrating our video/audio workload to Dyte. Please confirm the cancellation date and any final billing on our account.

Thanks.
